articles.title: Joel Embiid Out for Game 2 vs. Knicks with Ankle Sprain and Hip Soreness
articles.original_title: Joel Embiid out for 76ers Game 2 against Knicks with right ankle sprain, hip soreness
articles.summary: Philadelphia center Joel Embiid will miss Game 2 of the Eastern Conference semifinals after sustaining a right ankle sprain and right‑hip soreness. The injury comes as the 76ers trail the New York Knicks 1‑0 in the series, further hampering Philadelphia’s chances of leveling the matchup.
key_points: Embiid ruled out for Game 2 due to a right ankle sprain and hip soreness.
The 76ers fall behind 1‑0 to a Knicks team that has won its first two games.
Philadelphia’s frontcourt depth will be tested without its star center.

articles.title: Ayo Dosunmu Cleared for Timberwolves‑Spurs Game 2; Anthony Edwards Questionable
articles.original_title: Ayo Dosunmu available for Timberwolves-Spurs Game 2, Anthony Edwards listed as questionable
articles.summary: Minnesota guard Ayo Dosunmu has been confirmed healthy for Game 2 against San Antonio, while Anthony Edwards remains listed as questionable after his surprise return in Game 1. The Wolves will assess Edwards’ status before tip‑off, but Dosunmu’s availability adds stability to the backcourt.
key_points: Dosunmu is 100% for Game 2, providing a boost to Minnesota’s guard rotation.
Edwards is listed as questionable despite playing in the previous game.
The Wolves will decide Edwards’ participation after further evaluation.

articles.title: Embidd Out Again: Right Ankle Sprain and Hip Issues Sideline Star for Game 2
articles.original_title: Joel Embiid is out for Game 2 of the 76ers' series against the Knicks with ankle and hip injuries
articles.summary: Joel Embiid will sit out the second game of the 76ers‑Knicks series after being added to the injury report with a right‑ankle sprain and a sore right hip. The timing of the report, just hours before the game, leaves Philadelphia without its leading scorer as the series heads into a crucial juncture.
key_points: Embiid’s injury report was filed hours before Game 2.
Both the ankle sprain and hip soreness are expected to keep him out.
The 76ers must find alternative scoring options against a hot Knicks team.

articles.title: 2026 NBA Playoff Predictions: SportsLine Model Generates +600 Parlay Odds

A three‑way parlay is identified with an approximate +600 payout.
Predictions cover likely outcomes for each round of the 2026 playoffs.

key_points: Mitchell and Harden have been inconsistent, limiting the Cavs’ postseason outlook.
Improved scoring and playmaking from the duo are essential for a deeper run.
The team’s overall success hinges on the backcourt’s ability to perform under pressure.

articles.title: Luka Dončić Says He’s Unlikely to Play in Series
articles.original_title: Lakers star Luka Doncic breaks silence; says he’s unlikely to play in series - Los Angeles Times
articles.summary: Luka Dončić addressed media speculation by confirming he does not expect to be cleared to play in the upcoming playoff series. The Dallas Mavericks star cited ongoing hamstring concerns and the team’s medical evaluation as the primary reasons for his absence.
key_points: Dončić is doubtful to play in the series due to a lingering hamstring issue.
He emphasized that the medical staff has not given him clearance for full contact.
His unavailability could significantly impact the Mavericks’ playoff chances.

articles.title: Dončić Reveals 8‑Week Hamstring Recovery Timeline
articles.original_title: Luka Dončić reveals he was given 8-week recovery timeline after hamstring injury, hasn't been cleared for full contact - Yahoo Sports
articles.summary: Luka Dončić disclosed that doctors gave him an eight‑week recovery window after his recent hamstring injury and that he has not yet been cleared for full‑contact practice. The timeline suggests he will miss the remainder of the postseason.
key_points: Medical staff set an eight‑week recovery period for Dončić’s hamstring.
He remains prohibited from full‑contact drills and game action.
The prognosis likely sidelines him for the rest of the playoffs.

articles.title: LeBron James Breaks Down Lakers‑Thunder Game‑1 Strategy
articles.original_title: LeBron James details game plan breakdowns for Lakers vs Thunder in Game 1 - The Oklahoman
articles.summary: LeBron James outlined the Lakers’ game plan for their opening matchup against the Oklahoma City Thunder, focusing on defensive assignments, transition opportunities, and exploiting mismatches. He highlighted the importance of ball movement and rebounding to control the pace.
key_points: Emphasis on aggressive perimeter defense to limit the Thunder’s shooters.
Utilizing fast‑break chances generated by defensive rebounds.
Targeting specific mismatches with veteran experience and size.

articles.title: Dončić Provides Injury Update After Lakers Loss to Thunder
articles.original_title: Luka Doncic Gives Injury Update After Lakers Loss vs Thunder - heavy.com
articles.summary: Following the Lakers’ defeat, Luka Dončić gave a brief update on his hamstring status, confirming he is still undergoing rehab and has not received clearance for full participation. He expressed optimism about returning later in the season but acknowledged the current limitations.
key_points: Dončić remains in rehab and is not cleared for full contact.
He remains hopeful about a future return, though no timeline was given.
The Mavericks must adjust without his presence in the immediate games.

articles.title: Should You Buy or Sell LeBron James and Victor Wembanyama Cards During Playoffs?
articles.original_title: Time to Buy or Sell LeBron James, Victor Wembanyama Cards in the NBA Playoffs? - Sports Illustrated
articles.summary: Sports Illustrated examines the short‑term market dynamics for LeBron James and rookie Victor Wembanyama cards amid the NBA playoffs, weighing performance trends, scarcity, and collector demand. The analysis offers guidance on whether to hold, buy, or sell based on current valuations.
key_points: LeBron’s playoff performance and legacy keep his cards relatively stable.
Wembanyama’s rookie cards have surged due to limited supply and hype.
The article recommends a cautious buy‑on‑dip strategy for Wembanyama and holding LeBron cards for long‑term value.

articles.title: Lakers' Luka Doncic Begins Next Phase of Rehab
articles.original_title: Lakers' Luka Doncic: Begins next phase of rehab - CBS Sports
articles.summary: Luka Doncic has entered the next stage of his rehabilitation program following his recent injury. The team’s medical staff outlined the new focus on strength and conditioning work to prepare him for a return to the lineup.
key_points: Doncic moves from rest and basic therapy to more intensive conditioning.
Lakers expect a gradual increase in minutes once cleared.
The timeline for his return remains uncertain, but the team is optimistic.

articles.title: Ravens’ Kyle Hamilton Criticizes Fans for Ignoring LeBron James
articles.original_title: Ravens’ Kyle Hamilton expresses sadness over fans’ LeBron James ignorance - hitc.com
articles.summary: Kyle Hamilton expressed disappointment that many fans seem unaware of LeBron James' impact on the game. He highlighted the importance of recognizing veteran leadership and the broader cultural influence of star players.
key_points: Hamilton called out a perceived lack of knowledge about LeBron among younger fans.
He emphasized James' role in shaping modern NBA culture.
The comment sparked discussion on how media coverage influences fan awareness.

articles.title: Bronny’s Influence Cited as Key to LeBron’s Postseason Success
articles.original_title: What's been key to LeBron James' stellar play in postseason? Bronny - Akron Beacon Journal
articles.summary: The Akron Beacon Journal reported that LeBron James attributes part of his recent postseason performance to the motivation and energy he gets from his son, Bronny. The father‑son dynamic appears to be a psychological boost during high‑stakes games.
key_points: LeBron says Bronny’s presence fuels his competitive drive.
The relationship adds an emotional component to his on‑court focus.
Analysts note the added motivation could translate into clutch performances.

articles.title: Bronny’s Influence Cited as Key to LeBron’s Postseason Success
articles.original_title: What's been key to LeBron James' stellar play in postseason? Bronny - USA Today
articles.summary: USA Today echoed the sentiment that Bronny James plays a significant role in LeBron’s recent playoff excellence. The article details how family pride and mentorship intertwine with LeBron’s veteran experience.
key_points: LeBron credits his son’s support for heightened focus and confidence.
The narrative underscores the personal side of elite competition.
Media outlets highlight the story as a human‑interest angle on the playoffs.

articles.title: Thunder Exploit Lakers’ Margin for Error in Game 1 Rout
articles.original_title: Thunder shows how big its margin for error is vs. Lakers in Game 1 rout - The Oklahoman
articles.summary: Oklahoma City demonstrated how little room the Lakers have for mistakes in their opening playoff loss. The Thunder capitalized on turnovers and defensive lapses to secure a decisive victory.
key_points: Lakers struggled with ball security and defensive rotations.
Thunder’s aggressive offense exposed the Lakers’ vulnerabilities.
The result puts pressure on Los Angeles to tighten execution in the series.
